final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media cover image for a product announcement.

Style/medium: needs a premium editorial magazine aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be diagonal composition
Subject: must include the product announcement context as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a high-contrast accent color direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: must preserve diagonal composition structure, must be suitable for Xiaohongshu cover format
Avoid:
